message:
fix(extension): use Cx timer driver for event timeout and harden mutex recovery

Replaces direct Instant::now() calls in the events.emit timeout loop with
Cx::current() timer driver lookups, ensuring the extension dispatcher
respects the configured clock abstraction (critical for deterministic
testing and simulated time scenarios). Falls back to wall_now() when no
Cx context is available.

Also hardens a test-only mutex lock in MockAuditStore by replacing
.unwrap() with .unwrap_or_else(PoisonError::into_inner), preventing
test panics from cascading through poisoned mutexes. Adds
#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] annotation to a legitimately large
integration test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
